Actually let me rewrite:

import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut unique: List<String> = []
mut count = 0
for tok in tokens
  mut found = false
  for u in unique
    if u == tok
      found = true
    end
  end
  if not found
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")

Hmm but I need to actually track unique tokens. Without push for List<String>, I can't add. Let me use a different approach - rebuild the list each iteration is hard too.

Actually I just need count. I can iterate tokens and for each token check if it appeared earlier in tokens before this index. Use indexed iteration.

```
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
let n = tokens.len()
while i < n
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  mut seen = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(prev)
      match tok
      when Some(t)
        if prev == t
          seen = true
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not seen
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
```

This works without needing push.

import string

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
let n = tokens.len()
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut seen = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(prev)
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(cur)
        if prev == cur
          seen = true
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not seen
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
```

import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
let n = tokens.len()
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut seen = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(prev)
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(cur)
        if prev == cur
          seen = true
        end
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not seen
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
